creator: raichoo@googlemail.com
text:
DHCP requests work (ip address gets assigned, route and nameserver get set), after that i can't ping any computer in the network. Ping returns sendto: No buffer space available

pciconf returns:

rl0@pci0:0:14:0 class=0x020000 card=0x813910ec chip=0x813910ec rev=0x10 hdr=0x00

I had this problem on 2 different boxes (laptop and desktop). RELEASE worked on my laptop.

If you need more info, feel free to mail me.

Regards,
Björn

How-To-Repeat: run dhclient rl0 and ping a random server on the net or local network.
